plugins.name: CustomCSS
plugins.description: Live CSS editor built into Discord. Open with Ctrl+Shift+K and see changes in real time.
plugins.author: TheFallenNightAdmin

plugins.name: NoTypingIndicators
plugins.description: Hides the 'X is typing...' indicator in all channels.
plugins.author: TheFallenNightAdmin

plugins.name: AlwaysOnTop
plugins.description: Keeps Discord window above all other windows.
plugins.author: TheFallenNightAdmin

plugins.name: ShowTimezones
plugins.description: Shows a user's local time in their profile popout. Add [tz:Region/City] to your bio.
plugins.author: TheFallenNightAdmin

plugins.name: MusicMenu
plugins.description: A floating music player inside Discord. Search and play YouTube and SoundCloud tracks directly.
plugins.author: pagoni meow

plugins.name: MenuDuo
plugins.description: Music player (Alt+M) and theme switcher (Esc) combined in one plugin.
plugins.author: pagoni meow

plugins.name: LocalThemeSwitcher
plugins.description: Randomly applies one of your installed themes on startup. Press Escape to open the switcher.
plugins.author: Pagoni Hax
